File: COTRTLIC.cbl
Program: COTRTLIC - Business logic - List Transaction Type for updates and deletes
Data: WS-MISC-STORAGE (lines 84-376)
results.summary: data_division WS-MISC-STORAGE in COTRTLIC.cbl. uses COPY refs: SQL:CSDB2RWY, CVCRD01Y, SQL:SQLCA, SQL:DCLTRTYP....
results.content:
01  WS-MISC-STORAGE.
******************************************************************
* General CICS related
******************************************************************

   05 WS-CICS-PROCESSNG-VARS.
      07 WS-RESP-CD            PIC S9(9) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
      07 WS-REAS-CD            PIC S9(9) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
      07 WS-TRANID             PIC X(4)       VALUE SPACES.


******************************************************************
* Input edits
******************************************************************
   05 WS-INPUT-FLAG                          PIC X(1).
     88  INPUT-OK                            VALUES '0'
                                                    ' '
                                             LOW-VALUES.
     88  INPUT-ERROR                         VALUE '1'.
   05  WS-EDIT-TYPE-FLAG                     PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-TYPEFILTER-NOT-OK               VALUE '0'.
     88  FLG-TYPEFILTER-ISVALID              VALUE '1'.
     88  FLG-TYPEFILTER-BLANK                VALUE ' '.
   05  WS-EDIT-DESC-FLAG                     PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-DESCFILTER-NOT-OK               VALUE '0'.
     88  FLG-DESCFILTER-ISVALID              VALUE '1'.
     88  FLG-DESCFILTER-BLANK                VALUE ' '.
   05 WS-TYPEFILTER-CHANGED                  PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-TYPEFILTER-CHANGED-NO           VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-TYPEFILTER-CHANGED-YES          VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-DESCFILTER-CHANGED                  PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-DESCFILTER-CHANGED-NO           VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-DESCFILTER-CHANGED-YES          VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-ROW-RECORDS-CHANGED                 PIC X(01)
                                             OCCURS 7 TIMES.
     88  FLG-ROW-DESCR-CHANGED-NO            VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-ROW-DESCR-CHANGED-YES           VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-DELETE-STATUS                       PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-DELETED-NO                      VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-DELETED-YES                     VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-UPDATE-STATUS                       PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-UPDATED-NO                      VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-UPDATE-COMPLETED                     VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-ROW-SELECTION-CHANGED               PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-ROW-SELECTION-CHANGED-NO        VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-ROW-SELECTION-CHANGED-YES       VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-BAD-SELECTION-ACTION                PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-BAD-ACTIONS-SELECTED-NO         VALUE LOW-VALUES.
     88  FLG-BAD-ACTIONS-SELECTED-YES        VALUE 'Y'.
   05 WS-ARRAY-DESCRIPTION-FLGS              PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-ROW-DESCRIPTION-ISVALID         VALUE LOW-VALUES
                                                   SPACES.
     88  FLG-ROW-DESCRIPTION-NOT-OK          VALUE '0'.
     88  FLG-ROW-DESCRIPTION-BLANK           VALUE 'B'.
   05  WS-DATACHANGED-FLAG                   PIC X(1).
     88  NO-CHANGES-FOUND                    VALUE '0'.
     88  CHANGES-HAVE-OCCURRED               VALUE '1'.

*  Generic Input Edits
   05  WS-GENERIC-EDITS.
     10 WS-EDIT-VARIABLE-NAME                PIC X(25).

     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-ONLY                PIC X(256).
     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-LENGTH              PIC S9(4) COMP-3.

     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-ONLY-FLAGS          PIC X(1).
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-ISVALID            VALUE LOW-VALUES.
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-NOT-OK             VALUE '0'.
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-BLANK              VALUE 'B'.

   05  WS-OTHER-EDIT-VARS.
     10 WS-RECORDS-COUNT                     PIC S9(4) COMP-3
                                             VALUE 0.

******************************************************************
*  Input edits array variables
******************************************************************
******************************************************************
*  Screen Data Array         52 CHARS X 7 ROWS = 364
******************************************************************

   05 WS-SCREEN-DATA-IN.
      10 WS-ALL-ROWS-IN                      PIC X(364).
      10 FILLER REDEFINES WS-ALL-ROWS-IN.
         15 WS-SCREEN-ROWS-IN OCCURS  7 TIMES.
            20 WS-EACH-ROW-IN.
               25 WS-EACH-TTYP-IN.
                  30 WS-ROW-TR-CODE-IN       PIC X(02).
                  30 WS-ROW-TR-DESC-IN       PIC X(50).


   05 WS-EDIT-SELECT-COUNTER                 PIC S9(04)
                                             USAGE COMP-3
                                             VALUE 0.
   05 WS-EDIT-SELECT-FLAGS                   PIC X(7)
                                             VALUE LOW-VALUES.
   05 FILLER  REDEFINES  WS-EDIT-SELECT-FLAGS.
      10 WS-EDIT-SELECT                      PIC X(1)
                                             OCCURS 7 TIMES.
         88 SELECT-OK                        VALUES 'D', 'U'.
         88 DELETE-REQUESTED-ON              VALUE 'D'.
         88 UPDATE-REQUESTED-ON              VALUE 'U'.
         88 SELECT-BLANK                     VALUES
                                             ' ',
                                             LOW-VALUES.

   05 WS-EDIT-SELECT-ERROR-FLAGS             PIC X(7)
                                             VALUE LOW-VALUES.
   05 FILLER  REDEFINES WS-EDIT-SELECT-ERROR-FLAGS.
      10 WS-EDIT-SELECT-ERRORS               OCCURS 7 TIMES.
         20 WS-ROW-TRTSELECT-ERROR           PIC X(1).
            88 WS-ROW-SELECT-ERROR           VALUE '1'.

   05 WS-SUBSCRIPT-VARS.
      10 I                                  PIC S9(4) COMP
                                            VALUE 0.
      10 I-SELECTED                         PIC S9(4) COMP
                                            VALUE 0.
   05 WS-ACTIONS-SELECTED.
      07 WS-ACTIONS-REQUESTED               PIC S9(04)
                                            USAGE COMP-3
                                            VALUE 0.
         88 WS-ONLY-1-ACTION                VALUE 1.
         88 WS-MORETHAN1ACTION              VALUES 2 THRU 7.
      07 WS-DELETES-REQUESTED               PIC S9(04)
                                            USAGE COMP-3
                                            VALUE 0.
      07 WS-UPDATES-REQUESTED               PIC S9(04)
                                            USAGE COMP-3
                                            VALUE 0.
      07 WS-NO-ACTIONS-SELECTED             PIC S9(04)
                                            COMP-3
                                            VALUE 0.
   05 WS-VALID-ACTIONS-SELECTED             PIC S9(04)
                                            USAGE COMP-3
                                            VALUE 0.
      88 WS-ONLY-1-VALID-ACTION             VALUE 1.

******************************************************************
* Output edits
******************************************************************
   05 CICS-OUTPUT-EDIT-VARS.
     10  TRAN-TYPE-CD-X                      PIC X(02).
     10  TRAN-TYPE-CD-N REDEFINES TRAN-TYPE-CD-X
                                             PIC 9(02).
     10  FLG-PROTECT-SELECT-ROWS             PIC X(1).
     88  FLG-PROTECT-SELECT-ROWS-NO          VALUE '0'.
     88  FLG-PROTECT-SELECT-ROWS-YES         VALUE '1'.
******************************************************************
* Output Message Construction
******************************************************************
   05  WS-LONG-MSG                           PIC X(800).
   05  WS-INFO-MSG                           PIC X(45).
     88  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                  VALUES
                                             SPACES LOW-VALUES.
     88  WS-INFORM-REC-ACTIONS               VALUE
         'Type U to update, D to delete any record'.
     88  WS-INFORM-DELETE                    VALUE
         'Delete HIGHLIGHTED row ? Press F10 to confirm'.
     88  WS-INFORM-UPDATE                    VALUE
         'Update HIGHLIGHTED row. Press F10 to save'.
     88  WS-INFORM-DELETE-SUCCESS            VALUE
         'HIGHLIGHTED row deleted.Hit Enter to continue'.
     88  WS-INFORM-UPDATE-SUCCESS            VALUE
         'HIGHLIGHTED row was updated'.
   05  WS-RETURN-MSG                         PIC X(75).
     88  WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                   VALUE SPACES.
     88  WS-EXIT-MESSAGE                     VALUE
         'PF03 pressed. Exiting'.
     88  WS-MESG-NO-RECORDS-FOUND            VALUE
         'No records found for this search condition.'.
     88  WS-MESG-NO-MORE-RECORDS             VALUE
         'No more pages for these search conditions'.
     88  WS-MESG-MORE-THAN-1-ACTION          VALUE
         'Please select only 1 action'.
     88  WS-MESG-INVALID-ACTION-CODE         VALUE
         'Action code selected is invalid'.
     88  WS-MESG-NO-CHANGES-DETECTED         VALUE
         'No change detected with respect to database values.'.
   05  WS-PFK-FLAG                           PIC X(1).
     88  PFK-VALID                           VALUE '0'.
     88  PFK-INVALID                         VALUE '1'.
   05 WS-STRING-FORMAT-VARS.
      10 WS-STRING-MID                      PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
      10 WS-STRING-LEN                      PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
      10 WS-STRING-OUT                      PIC X(45).

******************************************************************
* Data Handling
******************************************************************
   05 WS-DATA-FILTERS.
      10  WS-START-KEY                      PIC X(02).
      10  WS-TYPE-CD-FILTER                 PIC X(02)
                                            VALUE SPACES.
      10  WS-TYPE-DESC-FILTER               PIC X(52).
      10  WS-TYPE-CD-DELETE-FILTER.
          15 FILLER                         PIC X(01)
                                            VALUE '('.
          15 WS-TYPE-CD-DELETE-FILTER-X.
             20 WS-TYPE-CD-DELETE-KEYS      OCCURS 7 TIMES.
                25 FILLER                   PIC X(01)
                                            VALUE QUOTE.
                25 WS-TYPE-CD-DELETE-KEY    PIC

results.name: MAIN-PARA
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: MAIN-PARA (lines 73-107)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph MAIN-PARA in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN.
results.content:
MAIN-PARA.

           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE

           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COSGN0AO

           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO COSGN0AO
               MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COSGN0AI
               PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
           ELSE
               EVALUATE EIBAID
                   WHEN DFHENTER
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   WHEN DFHPF3
                       MOVE CCDA-MSG-THANK-YOU        TO WS-MESSAGE
                       PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT
                   WHEN OTHER
                       MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                       MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                       PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
               END-EVALUATE
           END-IF.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
                     LENGTH(LENGTH OF CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.


      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1400-SETUP-MESSAGE
results.preamble:
File: COCRDLIC.cbl
Program: COCRDLIC - Business logic - List Credit Cards
Paragraph: 1400-SETUP-MESSAGE (lines 895-932)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDLI, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y
results.summary: paragraph 1400-SETUP-MESSAGE in COCRDLIC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1400-SETUP-MESSAGE.                                                      
      *    SETUP MESSAGE                                                        
           EVALUATE TRUE                                                        
                WHEN FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                      
                WHEN FLG-CARDFILTER-NOT-OK                                      
                  CONTINUE                                                      
                WHEN CCARD-AID-PFK07                                            
                    AND CA-FIRST-PAGE                                           
                  MOVE 'NO PREVIOUS PAGES TO DISPLAY'                           
                  TO WS-ERROR-MSG                                               
                WHEN CCARD-AID-PFK08                                            
                 AND CA-NEXT-PAGE-NOT-EXISTS                                    
                 AND CA-LAST-PAGE-SHOWN                                         
                  MOVE 'NO MORE PAGES TO DISPLAY'                               
                  TO WS-ERROR-MSG                                               
                WHEN CCARD-AID-PFK08                                            
                 AND CA-NEXT-PAGE-NOT-EXISTS                                    
                  SET WS-INFORM-REC-ACTIONS TO TRUE                             
                  IF  CA-LAST-PAGE-NOT-SHOWN                                    
                  AND CA-NEXT-PAGE-NOT-EXISTS                                   
                      SET CA-LAST-PAGE-SHOWN TO TRUE                            
                  END-IF                                                        
                WHEN WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                         
                WHEN CA-NEXT-PAGE-EXISTS                                        
                  SET WS-INFORM-REC-ACTIONS TO TRUE                             
                WHEN OTHER                                                      
                   SET WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE TO TRUE                               
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-ERROR-MSG          TO ERRMSGO OF CCRDLIAO                    
                                                                                
           IF  NOT WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                           
           AND NOT WS-NO-RECORDS-FOUND                                          
              MOVE WS-INFO-MSG        TO INFOMSGO OF CCRDLIAO                   
              MOVE DFHNEUTR           TO INFOMSGC OF CCRDLIAO                   
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           .

results.name: GETACCTDATA-BYACCT
results.preamble:
File: COPAUS0C.cbl
Program: COPAUS0C - CICS COBOL IMS BMS Program - Summary View of Authoriation Messages
Paragraph: GETACCTDATA-BYACCT (lines 865-914)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COPAU00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CIPAUSMY, COPY CIPAUDTY, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph GETACCTDATA-BYACCT in COPAUS0C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COPAU00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN.
results.content:
GETACCTDATA-BYACCT.
      *****************************************************************

           MOVE XREF-ACCT-ID            TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID
           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-ACCTFILENAME)
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                INTO      (ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF ACCOUNT-RECORD)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                  continue
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD        TO WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD        TO WS-REAS-CD-DIS

                  STRING
                  'Account:'
                   WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                  ' not found in ACCT file. Resp:' WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  ' Reas:' WS-REAS-CD-DIS
                  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
                  END-STRING
                  MOVE -1       TO ACCTIDL OF COPAU0AI
                  PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                  MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD        TO WS-RESP-CD-DIS
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD        TO WS-REAS-CD-DIS

                  STRING
                  'Account:'
                   WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                  ' System error while reading ACCT file. Resp:'
                  WS-RESP-CD-DIS ' Reas:' WS-REAS-CD-DIS
                  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
                  END-STRING
                  MOVE -1       TO ACCTIDL OF COPAU0AI
                  PERFORM SEND-PAULST-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE
           .

      *****************************************************************
